race.comment: Competitive. ELEANOR NANCY (5) just missed the hat-trick this track/trip in stronger class. Has Butler aboard on a quick back-up and she can bounce right back. FLYING CELICA (10) was busting to win before a plain effort here over longer ($2.7F). Back to the mile suits better and she should be right in it. MOOTESSA (7) got well back over 1650m at Doomben last time and never threatened. Ran a good race there prior and is suited back to provincial level and also has claims. MALECON (1) peaks and has been racing in 70s. Has the handy 2kg claim and we can see more from him today. MAPLE DOOR (2) was tracking well before the latest and is also better suited. The 2kg claim helps.
